response.justification: Bogdan's resume demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a diverse tech stack (e.g., JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, Dlang), but lacks the mandatory 5–10 years of C++ development on Windows platforms. While he has C/C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments, LabWindows/CVI), it is not recent, substantial, or aligned with capital markets/fixed-income systems. His domain expertise in financial services is minimal, with only a brief stint at RIDE Capital, and no mention of fixed-income derivatives, investment banking, or SQL Server/Oracle proficiency.
strengths: Strong full-stack development skills across multiple languages and frameworks (JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js)
Proven ability to work in fast-paced environments with CI/CD and DevOps practices
Experience in low-latency systems and real-time data handling (e.g., Dunnhumby media)
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience on Windows platforms (mandatory requirement not met)
Limited domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income
No demonstrated experience with SQL Server, Oracle, or financial systems

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in capital markets/fixed income
